title: ayenia limitaris
intro: Ayenia limitaris, also known as the "Mexican Ayenia" or "Squaw Weed," is a perennial plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been utilized in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Ayenia limitaris include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support skin health, making it a valuable herb for treating conditions such as bronchitis and eczema. In herbal preparations, Ayenia limitaris can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
